title: Rustico
description: The go-to smooth & clean 32x resource pack.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e9d92bad987be0682c93bd4f8999192c4d6ad8b.jpeg)

The go-to smooth & clean 32x resource pack.

**Rustico** is a **smooth contemporary 32x art style** for Minecraft. The textures are carefully designed to be **detailed, but not photo-realistic; organic, but not cartoony.**

Recommended Mods

The mods "[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)" or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), and [ESF](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf) by Traben are all **RECOMMENDED** as this pack contains features that require them to work properly such as water color, better skies, light maps, and more on the way!

Additional Information:

This pack recieves weekly/bi-weekly updates as its being developed! If you have any feedback, **want to report a bug**, or generally need help, **join our** [Discord](https://discord.gg/VteNSphAtm) **server**!
